title: Chhipphir Khuarel chhiatna thleng enfiahin Zonal Officer-in Report pe
content:
Dated Hnahthial, the 28th April, 2026 :Nimin thli leh ruah nasa tak thawk vanga Chhipphir khaw chhunga chhiatna thleng enfiah turin vawiin khan SDC, Pu Lawrence Lalhlanthara leh Chhipphir Zonal Officer, Pu Lalhruaitluanga, SDC te chu a hmunah an kal a. Theih ang angin tlawmngaia thawkchhuakte nen tangruala hma la nghalin chhiat tawkte chhawmdawl nan silpauline 116 an sem nghal bawk a ni.

Zonal Officer, Pu Lalhruaitluanga report danin nimin khuarel chhiatna vanga in chhia hi sawmsarih leh pathum (73) awmin a pumpui (100%) a chhia hi pahnih (2) an awm a, chhungkaw riah chhuah ngai sawmhnih (20) an awm bawk. Hei bakah hian Indoor Hall chu thliin a chung hikin electric ban 3 a tluk bakah line chat a awm nual a. Community Hall bakah Dawmdawiin store room chungte chu thliin a hik ve ve a report niin Chhipphir leh Zote 'S' inkar kawng thing te chu a tluk nual thu tarlan a ni bawk.

Report tarlan danin nimin April ni 27,2026 tlai dar 4:25 leh tlai dar 4:40 inkar khan thli nasa tak tleh vangin chhiatna tarlan takte hi a thleng a. A thlen lai hria, VB-G RAM G hnuaia hnathawktute chuan thli hi thawngaleivir ang maia a rawn tleh thu an sawi a ni.

Zonal Officer kalte chu Bualpui 'V' atangin tlawmngai mi sawmsarih (70) leh Zote 'S' atangin tlawmngai mi sawmli (40) te chuan an tawiawm a. Chhiatna thlenna hmun tinte chu tlawh kualin a theih ang angin a hmunah chawmdawlna hna hi thawh nghal a ni.

Zonal Officer-te chuan chhiatna tawkte tanpui nan silpauline za leh sawm paruk (116) semin, tlawmngaia thawkchhuak hnatlangte thingpui lumna tur pawisa fai ₹ 4000/- an pe bawk.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWL WILDLIFE DIVISION HMALAKNAIN AR NOTE SEM CHHUAH A NI
content:
315/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 28th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan Khawzawl Wildlife Division hmalaknain Vapar, Murlen leh N. Khawbung khuaahte Murlen National Park-a Eco-Development activity hnuaia hmalakna pakhat atan Rainbow Rooster ar no 4000 sem chhuah leh a ni a. Heng khaw pathum aṭang hian chhungkaw 80 hnenah ar note 50 zela semchhuah niin, ar note sem chhuah zat hi a vaiin 4000 a ni. He hmalakna hian a tum ber chu Protected Area bulhnaia chengte tana ramngaw leh nungcha humhalh chunga eizawnna tha zawk kawh hmuh bakah mihringten nungchate chenna hmun kan nek chep zel tihziaawm a ni.

He programme kaltlang hian ar note hi tum hnih sem chhuah tawh niin ar note 7000 chu Murlen National Park chhehvel khaw parukah sem chhuah tawh a ni a. He hmalakna hi kalpui zel tur niin khaw pasarih dangah la sem leh tura ruahman a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit-ah TSG,Green-Ag Project District Level Convergence thukhawm
content:
314/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 28th of April, 2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah TSG, Green-Ag project 9th Technical Support Group (TSG) meeting chu Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap kaihhruainaa neih a ni , kum 2026 -2027 chhunga Green Landscape Management Plan thlirho niin line department te nena thawhho theih dan sawi a ni bawk.

District Bawrhsap chuan Sawrkar Department hrang hrangte inlungrual taka thawhhona a pawimawhzia sawiin, Green-Ag project huam chhung khuaah te chuan thawhhona awmze nei taka awm ngei a beisei a, ram hmasawn nan theihtawp chhuah turin a chah a ni.

Kum 2026-27 chhunga Mamit District a Green-Ag hmalakna tur hrang hrang te sawi ho a ni a. He project hmalakna-Green Landscape Management Plan (GLMP) kalpui dan tur sawi ho a ni a, line department te nen thawhhona dan leh mipuite mamawh leh hamthatna dah hmasaa hmalak ho dan rel a ni.

Green-Ag project hi Food and Agriculture Organisation (FAO) Global Environment Facility (GEF) funding niin, kum 2019 khan Mizoram-ah bul tan a ni a, Mamit leh Lunglei district ah kalpui niin Dampa Tiger Reserve leh Thorangtlang wildlife sanctuary bul hnai a khaw 38 te a huam a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit District Level Committee on Narco Coordination Centre thukhawm
content:
313/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 28th of April,2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah District Level Committee on Narco Coordination Centre chu Pu Suvigya S Chandra, Chairman leh District Bawrhsap kaihhruanain an thukhawm.

District Bawrhsap chuan ruihhlo do kawnga uar taka hmalak a tul thu sawiin hemi kawngah hian khawtlang hruaitute te hian mawhphurna lian tak an nei a, line department te nen thawhhona tha nei zel turin a fuih a. Zirna school leh college ah te uar zawka awareness campaign neih a ngai a, ruihhlo hi hmasawnna daltu a ni a, hemi kawngah hian puitlingin naupang te kawng dika hruai hi kan mawhphurna a ni a ti bawk.

Thutkhawmah hian Pu Manny Bhushan Singh, SP Mamit chuan Dapchhuah check post verification neih chungchang leh ruihhlo do kawnga hmalakna te a tarlang a.

Committee chuan check post hmun hniha siam- Mamit junction leh West Phaileng-a siama Dapchhuah check post chu tih tawp a rel a, he check post thar te hi ruihhlo dona kawngah hman tangkai a nih zawk beisei a ni. Vawiin thutkhawmah hian zirlaite tan drugs awareness campaign huaihawt a tul thu sawi a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: ZUANGTUI-II POLLING STATION A VOTE TLA CHHIAR A NI
content:
311/2026-2027

Aizawl the 28th April, 2026:State Election Commission, Mizoram thupek angin tahrik ni 28 April, 2026 (Thawhlehni) chhun dar 12 khan I/7 – Zuangtui-II Polling Station-a vote tlate chu Dr. H. Lalthlangliana, State Election Commissioner, Mizoram kaihhruaina hnuaiah Candidate Election Agent te leh Municipal Returning Officer te hmuh laiin Pu Laxman Khot, BEL EVM Engineer chuan EVM Control Unit Sl. No. Z07457 chu hawngin vote tlate chu tluang takin a la chhuak thei a. Ward No.I-a vote tlak dan leh candidate tinte vote hmuh dan chu hetiang hi a ni:

I/7 – Zuangtui-II Polling Station-a vote tlate chhiar hian candidate thlan tlin leh tling lote a nghawng loh lain State Election Commission, Mizoram chuan Zuangtui-II Polling Station-a hun leh tha senga vote thlak tute duhthlanna hriat loh a liam tir mai hi tha a ti lova, vote thlak tute an zahawm a ti em em a. Inthlan buaipui tute hun leh tha sen a ngai hlu hle bawk a ni. Hei vang hian a hranpa liau liau a Zuangtui-II Polling Station-a vote tlate chhiar thei ngei tur hian Commission chuan hma a la ta a ni.

Vawiin a I/7 – Zuangtui-II Polling Station-a hman EVM Control Unit Sl. No. Z07457 hawnna leh vote chhiarna hunah hian MJA aiawh te, Political Party aiawh te, General Observer leh State Election Commission, Mizoram official te an tel a ni.

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT-A PMAY- HFA KALPUI MEK LEH HLAWHTLINNA AWM ANG ANGTE ZIRHONA NEI
content:
310/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 28th April 2026 :Vawiin khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin a Office Chamber-ah PMAY- HFA (Rural  & Urban )  ( Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana, Housing For All)  kalpui dan leh hlawhtlinna awm ang angte zirhona neih a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan PMAY - HFA(Rural & Urban) hnuaia hmasawnna leh hlawhtlinna thlirho theih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a . Central Sawrkar Scheme tha tak, khawpui chhunga mirethei leh chanhai zawkte tana chenna In,  tui, kawlphetha leh inthiarna tha zawk pek a nih angin a nihna ang tak leh mamawhtute tana hman chu thil pawimawh tak a ni, a ti. PMAY hamthatna dawngtute zingah hnathawk tha tak tak an awm laiin, thawk tha  duhlo an awm thin tih hriat a ni chu pawi a tih thu tarlangin, sawrkarin hamthatna a pek ang taka hmang thin turin a chah a. Bawrhsap chuan Insak tanpuina chu a mamawh tak takten an hmuh chu thil pawimawh tak a ni, tiin Poitlics kaltlanga induhsakna awmlo tura kalpu a tul hle tih tarlangin, dik leh langtlang taka kalpui bakah a hun taka sak zawh a nih theih nan District Administration chuan theihtawp a chhuah zel dawn a ni, a ti.

Pu H. Zonunmawia, PD, DRDO chuan PMAY ( Rural) 2025- 2026  kalpui dan tlangpui sawizauna a nei a. PMAY (Rural) chu Lawngtlai District - a Thingtlang pamah, SECC data tehfunga hmangin  installment hrang hranga pek a nih thu a sawi a. He Scheme hnuaiah hian In sak tanpuina atan cheng 1,30,000 pekchhuah thin a nih thu tarlangin, Kum 2024 - a survey neihah  hamthatna dawngtu tur (beneficiary )  mi - 12,630 an awm a ni, a ti.

Pi Margaret J. Vanlalremmawii, DPO, UD&PA chuan kum 2025- 2026 chhunga PMAY 2.0  ( Urban)  kalpui dan tlangpui sawizauna a nei a. PMAY 1.0 chu nikum khan khar tawh niin, PMAY 2.0 chu September, 2024 ah tan niin kum 5 chhung kalpui a ni ang a ti a. PMAY 2.0 ah hian Insak tanpuina dawngtu ten sum an tum ve ngai dawnin, a vaiin chen nuai 3.125 a awm dawn a, tun dinhmunah  mi -70 chu District Level Commitee in a pawmpui  tawh a ni, a ti. In sak tanpuina chu installment - thuma pek tur niin, pawisa dawn atanga thla 12- 18 chhunga sakzawh tur a nih thu a tarlang a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian sawrkar Official balak VC, NGO leh MJA iawhte an tel thei a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

title: SERCHHIP-A ‘NMBA – HRISELNA KUTPUI’ NEIH TUR CHUNGCHANG SAWI HO
content:
309/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 28th April 2026:May 14 -15, 2026-a Serchhip DC tuala neih tur Hriselna Kutpui chungchang ngaihtuahin vawiin khan Serchhip District Bawrhsap Paul L. Khuma hovin, he Kut-a mawhphurhna changtu sawrkar department hrang hrang hotute leh khawtlang hruaitu pawl hrang hrang aiawhte DC Meeting hall-ah thukhawm.

Bawrhsap Paul L. Khuma chuan Hriselna Kutpui thil tum tlangpui sawiin Serchhip mipui, a bikin mi harsa zawk leh rethei zawkte, hmunpui panna tur nei lo leh Serchhip-a damdawi inentirna tur la awm ve rih lo natna hrang hrang neite’n Daktawr thiamte a thlawna an rawn theihna tur te, damdawi a thlawn emaw, man tlawm zawk emawa an hmuh theihna tur a nih thu te, emergency leh rikrum thil - tui tla, drug OD, electric man, stroke, heart attack leh thil dang eng eng emawahte, dam lo sawngbawl dan hriat lohna avanga nunna chhan theih ngei turte’n ho tea nunna an chan thinna thleng thinte tih tlem a nih theih nan, Basic First Aid Training leh hriselna kaihhnawih awareness hrang hrangte, he Hriselna Kutpui-ah hian neih a nih tur thu sawiin Serchhip-a Daktawr awm sate bakah Aizawl atangin natna hrang hranga thiam bik Daktawrte chahchhuah an nih tur thu a sawi a.

Ruihhlo avanga Mizoram thalai tam takte buaina tihziaawm a nih theih nan leh  ruihhlo that lohzia inzirtirna te, thalaite’n rilru dik an put theihna tura inzirtirna te he NMBA - Hriselna Kutpui-ah hian neih a nih tur thu sawiin, mi tam tak nunna chhanhima an awm phah ngei theih nan, Serchhip District  mipuite chu he Kut-ah hian lo kal theuh turin a sawm a; chanvo neitute pawh rawngbawlna rilru pua theihtawp chhuahpui turin a sawm nghal bawk a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Serchhip District  Superintendent of Police Gavit Gogna, IPS pawh telin, mipuite’n hlawk taka an lo hman ngei a duh thu a sawi a; SDC Pi Lalchhanhimi hnen atangin hma lak dan tlangpui report ngaihthlak a nih hnuin, hlawhtling taka NMBA - Hriselna Kutpui hi hman a nih theih dan tur hrang hrangte rel ho a ni.

title: Hnahthial District AIDS Prevention & Control Committee thukhawm; HIV/AIDS hri pai 18 hmuchhuak thar
content:
308/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 28th April, 2026: ;Vawiin chawhma khan DC Meeting Hall-ah Hnahthial District AIDS Prevention & Control Committee chu Additional DC, Pu Zothanmawia Khiangte kaihhruaiin an thukhawm a. Hetah hian District Profile chungchang bakah District Action Plan chungchangte ngaihtuah niin Mission AIDS Suraksha chungchang inhrilhhriatna hun hman a ni.

Meeting-a tarlan a nih danin April 2025 atanga March 2026 chhungin Hnahthial District chhungah HIV/AIDS hri pai hmuh chhuah thar mi sawm pariat (18) awmin chung zinga sawm (10) chu mipa niin a dang pariat (8) chu hmeichhia an ni a. Hmeichhia kai zingah hian naupai lai pathum (3) an tel a ni.

Hmeichhiat mipatna atanga kai hi 73.30% niin inchiuna thianghlim lo atanga kai hi 26.70% an ni a. HIV/AIDS kai thar zinga 6.70% te chu kum 15 leh kum 24 inkar niin kai thar atanga 33.30% te chu kum 25 leh kum 34 inkar an ni bawk. Kum 35 leh kum 49 inkar kai thar hi 60% niin kum 14 hnuai lam leh kum 50 chunglam hmuhchhuah thar an awm lo a ni.

Thutkhawmnaah hian Hnahthial District AIDS Prevention and Control Committee member-te an tel a ni.

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT LEVEL COMMITTEE ON PMUY THUTKHAWM
content:
307/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 28th April 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihruaiin District Level Committee on Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY) chuan DC Conference Hall-ah thutkhawm an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei hmasa a.PMUY hnuaiah BPL- chhungkuaa hmeichhiate tan a thlawna LPG connection pek thin a nih angin, Lawngtlai District chhunga kalpui danah duhthu a sam lo hle a ti a. PMUY emaw scheme tha zawk pawh kalpui leh a nih chuan tha zawk leh changtlung zawka kalpui a pawimawh dawn hle tih tarlangin, Gas Agency - te lo inpuahchah tha turin a chah a. Bawrhsap chuan khawvel changkang zelah LPG cylinders hman nasat tawh niin, heihian chhungkaw khawsak a tizângkhai hle tih tarlangin, la hmang ve theilote zawnchhuah leh Connection pek kawngah theihtawp chhuah chhunzawm zel turin Gas Agency - te a chah nghal bawk.

Pu Lianchhuma Chinzah, DCSO chuan report tawi pekna neiin, Lawngtlai District- ah Gas Agency pali awmin heng zingah hian Nuteii Gas Agency, Chawngte chuan Free Gas Connection - 2554 pe tawhin Lawngtlai District - a titha ber an ni mek a ni, a ti.

Thutkhawmah hian Lawngtlai District- a Gas Agency -ten PMUY hnuaia Free Connection an pek dan tlangpui tarlanna an nei a. Vawiin thlenga an pek dan chu Khuma Gas Agency, Lawngtlai - 654, Chhangte Indane, Bungtlang 'S' - 400, Nutei Gas Agency, Chawngte - 2554, Blue Mountain Gas Agency, Sangau- 558. Tun dinhmunah hmasawnna tur tam tak a tam hle tih pawm tlangin chak zawka hmalak ni se an ti a. Gas Agency - te chu mipuite tana rawngbawl an nihna hriaa, mirethei leh chanhai zawkte tana theihtawp chhuah zel turin Committe - chuan an chah nghal a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian DCSO, Inspector, Legal Metrology, Gas Agency - te, CYLA,LWA,  MHIP aiawh leh MJA Lawngtlai - te an tel thei a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: Union Minister of State for Home Affairs Shri Bandi Sanjay Kumar holds meeting with Siaha District officials
content:
43/2026-2027

Siaha the 28th April 2026:The Union Minister of State for Home Affairs Shri Bandi Sanjay Kumar today held a high level interaction with district officials of Siaha through video conference from MINECO Secretariat Conference Hall, Aizawl. Deputy Commissioner Shri VL Hruaizela Khiangte along with head of offices and Officials from MADC joined from DC’s Mini Conference hall, Siaha.

DC Siaha gave a short round of introduction and gave a brief overview of the district. SP Siaha highlighted the peaceful law & order situation stressing that a strict vigil against illegal cross-border activities including drugs and arms trafficking is maintained under the overall framework of national security. Department officials from the district appraised the Minister on the ongoing schemes as well as their achievements and the challenges they faced.

Various topics including cross border issues, international trade, security related issues, education and health and how to mitigate these challenges were discussed at length. The Minister stressed better coordination between Assam Rifles, State Police, District Administration, and Village Councils to ensure both security and welfare of border residents.

The Union Minister was expected to arrive in Siaha today but had to make alternative arrangement due to inclement weather.

Minister was accompanied by Shri Andra Vamsi, IAS , PS to MoS (Home), Protocal Officer and other state officials.

Attachment

title: Union Minister of State for Home Affairs Pu Bandi Sanjay Kumar in Siaha Sawrkar hotute kawm
content:
306/2026-2027

Siaha the 28th April 2026:Mizoram tlawha lo zin mek Union Minister of State for Home Affairs Pu Bandi Sanjay Kumar chuan video conference kaltlangin vawiin khan Siaha district chhunga sawrkar department hotute kawmna chu MINECO Secretariat Conference Hall, Aizawl atangin a nei a, Siaha District Bawrhsap Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte hovin head of office leh MADC Official ten DC Mini Conference hall, Siaha atangin an lo chhim a ni.

Union Minister of State for Home Affairs Pu Bandi Sanjay Kumar hi vawiin hian Siaha tlawh tura duanlawk ni mahse khua in a zir loh avangin ruahmanna tih danglam a ni.

He hunah hian Department hotuten district chhunga hmalakna hrang hrang tarlanna an nei a, an hnathawh meka harsatna an tawhte an thlen nghal bawk. Cross border chungchang bakah thenawm ram te nena insumdawn tawn chungchang te, Ruihtheihthil leh puakthei thil lakluh chungchangte bakah zirna leh hriselna lama district dinhmun leh chawikan zel dan tur te sawiho a ni.

Minister hi Pu Andra Vamsi, IAS , PS to MoS (Home) leh Protocal Officer te bakah official dang ten an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: PCCF in Kawrthah Forest Division a tlawh
content:
305/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 28th of April,2026:Ni 24th April - 25th Aprril,2026 khan Pu Rajeev Kumar Tiwari, IFS,Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (PCCF),Environment, Forests & Climate Change Department, Mizoram chuan Kawrthah Forest Division a tlawh a, field-a hnathawh dan thlirletna te, harsatna awm zirchianna te, ramngaw humhalh leh enkawlnaa tha zawka a kal theih nan hmalak zel dan tur a sawipui.

24th April khan Pu Rajeev Kumar Tiwari chuan Darlak Central Nursery a tlawh a, hna thawh mek te enfiahin chumi hnuah Kawrthah-a Division Headquarters a tlawh a, DFO Kawrthah te nen department hnathawh leh hmunhma te an tlawh a ni.

Kanhmun Range-ah Mualmam-a CAMPA ANR plantation a tlawh a,Division-in thingphun leh ramngaw siam tharna kawnga hma a lakna chu fakawm a ti.He hunah hian Division-in harsatna a tawh hrang hrang te,Luimawi leh Bungthuam khua, ramri bula teak kih ruk leh tawlh ruk chungchanga harsatna awm te a hmuna kalin a enfiah.

Mizoram-Assam ramri Medili bial pawh tlawh in, ramri buai dinhmun leh a hmunhma te a enfiah bawk. Zamuang-a mimal teak huan, conditional felling scheme hnuaia ram surrender hmasa ber neihna hmun a tlawh a,he hmun hi department plantation atana siam that leh thing phun lehna tura hmalak mek a ni.

Pu Rajeev Kumar Tiwari hian Rengdil (Lungkulh Biodiversity Hotspot) tlawhin biodiversity hausakna leh eco-tourism tih hmasawnna lama hmalakna kal mek chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi.

Attachment

title: Lunglei DDMC Chairman-in Lunglei District chhunga zirna inte tan ni 28.04.2026 (Thawhlehni) sikul chawlh a puang
content:
304/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 28:India Meteorological Department (IMD)-in khaw chin a thlir lawknaah April ni 28, 2026 (Thawhlehni) hian Lunglei District-ah thlipui leh ruahpui thawk tura a sawi lawk angin leh Lunglei District chhungah khua a la chhiat chhunzawm reng avangin, chhiatna nasa zawk thleng palh thei lakah mipui, a bik takin sikul naupangte an him theih nan Pi Navneet Mann, Deputy Commissioner & Chairman, Lunglei District Disaster Management Committee chuan Disaster Management Act, 2005 Section 30(v) tlawh chhanin, "Ni 28.04.2026 (Thawhlehni) hian Lunglei District chhunga zirna in zawng zawng khar tur a ni" tih thupek a chhuah.

Attachment
